howItWorks.intro: This car wash revenue calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Profit
rules.formula: Profit = Cars × Avg Ticket × Days × (1 - Expense%)

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.q: How much does a car wash make?
faq.a: Express washes average $50k-200k+ annual profit depending on volume and location.
Water, chemicals, equipment maintenance, labor, and rent make up 50-70% of revenue.
